ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., South, North) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "law_enforcement_agency" TEXT /* Primary law enforcement agency in the state */,
  "gov_website" TEXT /* Official government website of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the district belongs to */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the district */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the district */,
  "law_enforcement_agency" TEXT /* Primary law enforcement agency in the district */,
  "gov_website" TEXT /* Official government website of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type (e.g., Murder, Rape) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "legal_code" TEXT /* Relevant legal code for the crime type */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Typical penalties associated with the crime type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the crime type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the crime type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime the victim is associated with */,
  "victim_name" TEXT /* Name of the victim */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the victim (e.g., relationship to the suspect) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the victim */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the victim */,
  "relationship_to_suspect" TEXT /* Relationship between the victim and the suspect */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the victim record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the victim record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspects" (
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspect */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime the suspect is associated with */,
  "suspect_name" TEXT /* Name of the suspect */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the suspect */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the suspect */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the suspect (e.g., relationship to the victim) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the suspect */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the suspect */,
  "relationship_to_victim" TEXT /* Relationship between the suspect and the victim */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the suspect record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the suspect record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case outcome */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime the outcome is associated with */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of case outcome (e.g., Conviction, Acquittal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case outcome */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court where the case was tried */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Name of the judge who presided over the case */,
  "sentence" TEXT /* Sentence given to the suspect */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the case outcome record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the case outcome record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., law enforcement officer, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or unit the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* User's position or rank */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* User's contact phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the crime data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prevention_initiatives" (
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prevention initiative */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the initiative is implemented */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the initiative is implemented */,
  "initiative_name" TEXT /* Name of the prevention initiative */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the initiative */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the initiative */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the initiative */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the initiative */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the initiative */,
  "partners" TEXT /* Names of partner organizations involved in the initiative */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the initiative record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the initiative record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevention_initiatives_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevention_initiatives_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
